ingredients: Soy Sauce (Water, Soybean, Wheat, Salt), Sugar, Corn Starch, Mirin (Water, Corn Syrup, Rice, Koji, Alcohol), Hydrolysed Soy Protein, Spices, Concentrated Fruit Juice, Yeast Extract, Flavour Enhancers (621, 631, 627), Colour (150d).
long_description:
For culinary enthusiasts seeking Japanese-inspired flavours,
  • "Teri" refers to the sauce's glossy shine, while "yaki" signifies grilling or broiling;
  • Sweet and savory sauce used to marinate meats;
  • Perfect for adding authentic Japanese flavour to your favourite dishes;

    Introducing Obento Teriyaki Marinade 250mL, a classic Japanese sauce that brings sweet and savory notes to your culinary creations. Derived from the Japanese words "teri" for shine and "yaki" for grilling or broiling, this marinade adds a glossy finish and rich flavour to meats when cooked.
    Experience the authentic taste of Japanese cuisine with Obento Teriyaki Marinade. Whether you're marinating chicken, beef, or seafood, this versatile sauce elevates your dishes with its delicious flavour profile. Simply brush it on before grilling or broiling to infuse your meats with the irresistible taste of teriyaki.

    No Artificial Preservatives Added
name: Teriyaki Marinade

long_description: Transport your taste buds to a world of gourmet indulgence with The Golden Duck Kombu Seaweed Butter Potato Crisps, a snack designed to deliver the rich umami of kombu seaweed paired with the creamy decadence of butter. Inspired by the flavours of fine dining, these crisps strike a perfect balance between oceanic depth and smooth richness. Each bite offers a crisp texture that amplifies the luxurious, chef-crafted flavour profile, making it an unparalleled snack experience. Thoughtfully made with non-GMO ingredients and free from preservatives, these crisps are as wholesome as they are delicious. Ideal for food enthusiasts and adventurous snackers alike, they bring the essence of a high-end culinary experience straight to your fingertips. Whether paired with a glass of wine or enjoyed solo, these crisps transform ordinary moments into gourmet celebrations, embodying a snack that's both innovative and unforgettable.
name: Kombu Seaweed Butter Chips

ingredients: Seaweed (Porphyra Tenera) (58%), Corn Oil, Sesame Oil, Hot & Spicy Flavoured Seasoning Powder (5.5%) (Salt, Sugar, Dextrose, Onion Powder, Capsicum Powder (Corn Powder, Salt, Capsicum Oleoresin, Colour (160c)), Garlic Powder, Flavour Enhancers (621), Yeast Extract Powder, Soy Sauce Powder (Soybean, Maltodextrin, Salt), Colour (160c), White Pepper Powder, Chilli Powder, Acidity Regulators (296, 330), Sweetener (Stevia Glycosides), Cumin Powder, Natural Smoked Flavoured Oil, Garlic Oil), Salt.
long_description:
Introducing Obap Korean Seasoned Roasted Seaweed Hot & Spicy Flavour, a tantalizing fusion of traditional Korean ingredients and contemporary taste. These crispy roasted seaweed sheets are expertly seasoned with the fiery heat of Buldak spices, delivering a mouthwatering burst of flavour with every bite. With pocket-sized packaging, Obap Korean Seasoned Roasted Seaweed Hot & Spicy is perfect for enjoying on-the-go whenever hunger strikes. Whether you're at work, school, or traveling, satisfy your cravings for bold Korean flavours with these delicious roasted seaweed snacks.
Enjoy them straight out of the pack as a satisfying snack, or get creative by incorporating them into your favourite dishes. Sprinkle them over rice bowls, salads, or soups to add a spicy kick and an irresistible crunch that will elevate your culinary creations to new heights.
name: Roasted Seaweed Hot & Spicy Twin Pack

long_description:
Savor the authentic flavours of Japan,
  • Traditional wheat-based Japanese noodles perfect for stir-fries, salads, and soups;
  • Versatile and satisfying noodles ideal for a variety of dishes;
  • Made in Japan for an authentic culinary experience;

    Introducing Obento Ramen Noodles 150g, a classic staple of Japanese cuisine loved for its versatility and delicious flavour. Made from high-quality wheat flour, these noodles are perfect for creating a wide range of dishes, from stir-fries to salads to hearty soups. Made in Japan, these noodles uphold the traditions of Japanese culinary craftsmanship, ensuring a premium dining experience with every bite.
    Experience the authentic taste of Japan with Obento Ramen Noodles. Whether you're a seasoned chef or a home cook, Obento Ramen Noodles are sure to become a pantry essential. Elevate your meals with the authentic taste and versatility of Obento Ramen Noodles.

    98% Fat Free. Suitable for soup or stir-fry.

long_description:
Otoki Jin Ramen - the national ramen that has been loved for over 30 years, has gained popularity not only in South Korea but also internationally, thanks to its high-quality ingredients, authentic Korean flavors, and easy preparation method. With its signature mild taste, Otoki Jin Ramen satisfies cravings without overwhelming spice, making it perfect for those who prefer a milder kick. Each bite is a harmonious blend of savory broth, chewy noodles, and a tantalizing medley of traditional Korean spices, creating a culinary experience that's simply irresistible. It is easy-to-prepare format, you can enjoy restaurant-quality ramen in the comfort of your own home.
Otoki Jin Ramen can be served with any ingredients such as green onions, eggs, kimchi and dumpling. It is delicious to eat with anyone, anytime and anywhere.The rich beef and bone broth-based soup has a light charm, making it a taste that keeps you coming back for more.
name: Noodles Jin Ramen Mild

long_description:
Indulge in the bold, savory flavors of KSF Bowl Noodles Braised Beef—a satisfying meal that brings authentic Asian taste straight to your table in minutes. Crafted for busy lifestyles and flavor seekers alike, this 110g bowl delivers a deliciously rich braised beef broth, infused with aromatic spices and slow-cooked depth. Each bite of tender noodles is complemented by the hearty beef flavor, providing a warm, comforting meal any time of day.
Perfect for lunch at the office, a late-night snack, or a quick dinner solution, this bowl is ready in just minutes—simply add hot water or microwave for your convenience. The packaging is compact yet generous, ideal for on-the-go or at-home enjoyment.
KSF uses carefully selected ingredients to ensure quality and authenticity. Whether you're craving the nostalgic comfort of traditional Asian soup or looking for a new go-to pantry favorite, KSF Bowl Noodles Braised Beef delivers robust taste in every slurp.
Experience comfort food redefined—flavorful, filling, and fast.
name: Bowl Noodle Braised Beef

long_description: Indulge in a premium snacking experience with The Golden Duck Truffle Wagyu Potato Crisps, where the earthy, luxurious aroma of truffles harmonizes with the deep, rich essence of Wagyu beef. Drawing inspiration from the refined flavours of a truffle Wagyu don, these crisps deliver a taste that's nothing short of gourmet, yet in a vegetarian-friendly form. With each bite, you'll discover a symphony of flavours that are bold, indulgent, and satisfying. These chips are a testament to thoughtful craftsmanship, made with care to ensure a crunch that enhances their decadent taste. Non-GMO, gluten-free, and preservative-free, they're a luxurious treat you can feel good about enjoying. Whether you're entertaining guests or simply treating yourself, these crisps are designed to elevate your snacking to a new level of sophistication. Savory the ultimate combination of elegance and indulgence, all in one irresistible bag.

long_description:
Take your taste buds on a coastal journey with KSF Bowl Noodles Seafood, a 101g serving of savory, sea-inspired satisfaction. This ready-to-eat bowl brings the ocean to your table with a delicate yet rich seafood broth that's perfectly balanced and deeply satisfying.
Enjoy springy, premium-quality noodles swimming in a flavorful soup made from real seafood essences, herbs, and spices. Whether you're a seafood lover or just looking to change up your lunch routine, this bowl offers the perfect mix of convenience and gourmet flavor.
Ideal for those busy days when you need something quick, tasty, and filling—just add hot water or microwave for a steaming, aromatic bowl in minutes. The sleek bowl packaging is portable and easy to store, making it great for office lunches, dorm meals, or on-the-go nourishment.
KSF prides itself on delivering authentic Asian flavors using premium ingredients, and this seafood noodle bowl is no exception. It's not just a meal—it's a quick escape to the sea.
name: Bowl Noodle Seafood

description: S&B CURRY SAUCE WITH VEGETABLE HOT 210G
ingredients: Water, Vegetable (25%) (Potato, Carrot, Onion), Wheat Flour, Vegetable Oils (Palm Oil, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil), Sugar, Onion, Potato Paste, Curry Powder, Thickener (Hydroxypropyl Distarch Phosphate), Yeast Extract, Salt, Tomato Paste, Onion Powder, Colour (Caramel I), Spices (Contain Mustard, Celery), Roasted Garlic.
long_description:
S&B Curry Sauce with Vegetables is ready-made curry sauce in a retort pouch. Just put into hot water to warm the pre-cooked curry, and then it can be served just like home-cooked curry. Since it contains vegetables such as potatoes and carrots, you can simply enjoy with heating it up and serving over rice or noodles, or as dipping sauce! Spiciness stands out in the rich taste. It is perfect for those who like spicy food. S&B Curry Sauce with Vegetable contains no meat or meat related ingredients.
Excellent when served over Pork Cutlets or Chicken Cutlets and rice. Also good with roast chicken or cooked shrimp.
name: Curry Sauce With Vegetable Hot

Tonkatsu is a Japanese deep-fried, crumbed meat dish with sauce. This flavoursome Tonkatsu sauce, with its unique tinge of spices, is a versatile dipping sauce that also goes well with meat balls.
Experience the rich and savory taste of Tonkatsu sauce with Obento. Whether you're dipping crispy Tonkatsu cutlets or adding flair to homemade meatballs, this versatile sauce is sure to delight your taste buds with its delicious flavour profile.
Obento Tonkatsu Sauce best for dipping, Gluten Free and No Artificial Preservatives Added.

With a mellow taste, it is suitable for even those who do not like spicy food. S&B Curry Sauce with Vegetable contains no meat or meat related ingredients.
Excellent when served over Pork Cutlets or Chicken Cutlets and rice. Also good with roast chicken or cooked shrimp.
name: With Vegetable Mild

description: THE KIMCHI COMPANY VEGAN BAECHU KIMCHI 160G
ingredients: Cabbage, Water, Korean Red Chilli Pepper, Garlic, Salt, Ginger + Natural Sugar
long_description:
Savour the bold, authentic taste of our ready-to-eat, vegan kimchi in a convenient 160g can. It's pre-fermented to bring you a tangy kick to your favourite meal whether you're at home or on the go.

Deliciously Vegan, Convenient and Truly Authentic
The Kimchi Company brings you an authentic Korean kimchi experience made with 100% vegan ingredients. We've crafted the perfect balance of tangy and deeply savoury flavour while keeping it deliciously vegan, shelf-stable kimchi that you can take anywhere, hassle-free. We're talking anywhere from your next trip to Europe to your lunch bag for work tomorrow - it's ready to go and add a spicy kick to your next meal.

Your New Plant-Based Cooking Partner
Our Vegan Kimchi in a can is your perfect partner for creating vibrant, flavourful meals. Instantly elevate your vegan poke bowls, stir it into your favourite instant noodles, or add a pop of flavour to your tacos or sandwiches. It's also perfectly fermented and ready to be cooked over heat for your favourite Korean kimchi jjigae (soup) or bibimbap (Korean rice bowl).

Quality Ingredients for a Refreshing Taste
We pride ourselves on our commitment to flavour and quality. Our Vegan Kimchi is made with carefully selected ingredients, ensuring every can is a burst of authentic taste. It's also gluten-free, and contains no MSG, high fructose corn syrup, or preservatives.

  • 100% Plant-Based: An authentic, vegan recipe that’s free from animal products.
  • Ready-to-Eat & Cook Convenience: Enjoy delicious kimchi straight from the can, no refrigeration needed.
  • No Nasties: Free from preservatives, MSG, and high fructose corn syrup.
  • Authentic Baechu Kimchi: Made with crunchy Napa cabbage and traditional fermentation for a genuine Korean taste.
  • Gluten-Free: A safe and delicious option for those with gluten restrictions.
name: Vegan Baechu Kimchi

ingredients: Wheat Flour, Corn Starch, Baking Powder, Salt, Flavour Enhancer (E621), White Pepper Powder
long_description:
Obento Tempura Batter Mix has a light and crispy texture that is the key for making an authentic Japanese Tempura. It can be used to create a nice coating for prawns and vegetables.
The batter is prepared using cold water which gives it a light texture. When preparing the batter do not over mix as it will become tough and chewy when deep fried. Small lumps are common in the mixture and give a crunchy texture when fried.
Suggestion for tempura: Seafood: Prawns, fish, squid and scallops. Vegetables (thinly sliced): Capsicum, eggplant, carrot, zucchini, mushrooms and pumpkin
name: Tempura Batter Mix

long_description: Bring the taste of southern Thailand home with Maesri Masaman Curry Paste. In just a few steps, you can create a rich, comforting curry that's perfect for cosy nights or sharing with loved ones. Simply stir the paste into creamy coconut milk, add your choice of meat—like tender chicken or beef—plus hearty potatoes and sweet onions. Let it simmer gently to bring out the full depth of flavour. Finish with roasted peanuts for a touch of texture, and serve with rice, bread, or even pasta. With Maesri, authentic Thai flavour is effortless, delicious, and ready to impress—every time.
name: Masaman Curry Paste

It has gone through double fermentation and the first-draw essence is extracted. - No Added Preservatives, Colourings, Flavourings;
- Vegetarian and Vegan;
- Savoury with a hint of sweetness;
- Rich and intense soy flavour;
- Balance of sweetness and aroma of soy;
- Traditional craftmanship;
- 6 months fermentation;
- Naturally fermented

description: GOLDEN DUCK SOUR CREAM & SRIRACHA CHIPS 125G
ingredients: Dehydrated Potato Flakes (58%), Palm Olein (contains Antioxidant (320)), Sour Cream and Sriracha Flavoured Seasoning Mix (8%) (Sugar, Spices (Chilli Powder, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Colour (160c), Capsicum Oleoresin, Turmeric Powder), Milk Solids, Salt, Yeast Extract, Whey (Milk) Powder, Dextrose, Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Acidity Regulators (330, 296), Anticaking Agents (341, 551), Artificial Sour Cream Flavour), Tapioca Starch, Emulsifiers (322 from Soy, 471), Parsley.
long_description: Get ready to ignite your taste buds with The Golden Duck Sour Cream & Sriracha Potato Crisps, the ultimate fusion of tangy coolness and spicy heat. These crisps are carefully crafted to deliver a bold flavour profile that dances between the creamy, soothing notes of sour cream and the vibrant, fiery kick of sriracha. The result? A perfectly balanced flavour explosion that's both refreshing and thrilling. Made with real, high-quality spices, these crisps ensure that every crunch packs a punch of authenticity. As always, they're non-GMO, gluten-free, and preservative-free, so you can snack boldly without compromising on quality or health. Whether you're craving a midday pick-me-up or a snack to share during gatherings, these crisps are sure to stand out. Their zesty, spicy tang makes them an unforgettable addition to your snacking repertoire, satisfying adventurous palates with every bite.
name: Sour Cream & Sriracha Chips

long_description:
Whether you're sizzling chicken, grilling veggies, or charring paneer or halloumi, Fire up the grill and bring bold Indian flavours to your BBQ in just 10 minutes! No artificial colours, flavour or preservatives. Serves 4.
  • Serves 4 - ideal for family feasts or weekend cookouts.

  • No artificial colours or flavours, just a perfectly balanced blend of paprika, coriander, cumin, and more.

  • Inspired by traditional tandoor style cooking, made with the modern-day BBQ in mind.

  • Enjoy the treat of Indian flavour on the BBQ. Easy shortcut to big flavour.

  • Also perfect in the airfryer - just coat and cook!

  • Mild heat level.

  • Quick & Easy: Just mix with oil, coat your protein or veg, and BBQ for 10 minutes. That's it!.

  • Vegan Friendly: Perfect for meat-lovers and plant-based BBQ fans alike.

long_description:
Malay Chicken Biryani is a popular spice blend that enhances the flavors of a classic South Asian dish known as chicken biryani. Biryani is a fragrant and flavorful rice dish that incorporates a mixture of spices, meats, and aromatic ingredients, and Malay Chicken Biryani is designed to simplify the preparation of this beloved dish.

This particular spice blend is part of the Shan brand, which is renowned for its high-quality spice mixes and culinary products. The ingredients in this blend typically include a harmonious mix of spices such as coriander, cumin, turmeric, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, and bay leaves. These spices are expertly combined to create a well-balanced flavor profile that includes hints of earthiness, warmth, and a subtle spiciness.

Shan Malay Chicken Biryani is a perfect blend of traditional spices which helps you make delicious and aromatic chicken biryani at home. This aromatic blend of spices gives your biryani a delicious taste and highly appetising aroma.
name: Chicken Biryani

Let its exquisite aroma fill the air while you simmer it to perfection,and your family will be lured to the dining table bound by the spell. Daawat Select basmati rice is known far and wide for the magic its aroma creates. Fertilized by clean, snow-fed water from the Himalayas and processed with state-of-the-art technology, its uniform, long grains and pristine, white lustre never fail to entice.

Premium quality Basmati Rice
Authentic aroma originated from the foothills of the Himalayas
Long grains Grains stay firm and are never sticky
Perfect for Indian dished
Product of India
HACCP certified.

long_description:
Whether you're sizzling chicken, grilling veggies, or charring paneer or halloumi, Fire up the grill and bring bold Indian flavours to your BBQ in just 10 minutes! No artificial colours, flavour or preservatives. Serves 4.
  • Serves 4 - ideal for family feasts or weekend cookouts

  • Crafted with a blend of authentic spices like paprika, cumin, coriander, fenugreek, and cinnamon, this rub delivers a sweet, smoky, and aromatic flavour that's perfect for grilling or air frying.

  • Inspired by traditional tandoor style cooking, made with the modern-day BBQ in mind.

  • Enjoy the treat of Indian flavour on the BBQ. Easy shortcut to big flavour.

  • Mild heat level

  • Quick & Easy: Just mix with oil, coat your protein or veg, and BBQ for 10 minutes. That's it!.

  • Vegan Friendly: Perfect for meat-lovers and plant-based BBQ fans alike.

  • Sweet, smoky, and gently spiced with warm notes of cinnamon and fenugreek - a modern BBQ twist on a beloved Indian classic..

description: STREET KITCHEN NORTH INDIAN BUTTER CHICKEN KIT 255G
ingredients: Water, Tomatoes, Ginger, Garlic, Honey, Herbs & Spices, Sunflower Oil, Cream Powder (Milk), Yoghurt Powder (Milk), Vinegar, Salt, Almond Meal, Sugar, Corn Starch, Food Acid (Citric), Natural Colours (Paprika & Turmeric Oleoresins), Vegetable Gums (Xanthan, Guar), Natural Flavour (Milk)
long_description:
A mild creamy tomato sauce named after its silky texture. Just add Meat or Vegetables.

In India as the sun settles and a cool breeze lifts, commuting turns to foraging; drawn to the streets by the furious bustle of food carts you'll find vendors selling an eclectic feast for all tastes. In the north of India, Tandoor skewers wave invitingly with an array of richly marinated vegetables and meats. Many will choose a serve of freshly chargrilled chicken tikka, swirled into the best Butter Chicken sauce imaginable, ladled over steaming basmati rice. This is bliss! For your delight we have put together our finest ingrediens, blended perfectly, providing you with the basis for making your best Butter Chicken yet. We are sure this kit will keep you going, but can't guarantee it won't leave you wanting more!
By the way, there is so much pleasure that goes into creating the Butter Chicken that everyone has an edge! So give it a go today!
name: North Indian Butter Chicken Kit

long_description:
Patak's Butter Chicken Paste is a mild spice blend that contains 8 expertly blended aromatic spices including ginger, paprika and fenugreek.

In just 25 minutes, you can create the most delicious curry. Perfect for the family as our paste allows for 3 to 4 serves in an easy, portionable single use format to avoid any wastage.

Simply fry onion. Sizzle the paste to release flavours and brown your meat or vegetables. Add tomatoes and simmer until all cooked through. Stir in the cream and butter. Garnish with fresh coriander.

Contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives.
Suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Mild heat level so suitable for everone!

Did you know? Patak's Paste's are the ultimate slow cooker secret, as the aromatic spices pair perfectly with the slow, low-heat cooking process to provide a delicious and fragrant meal.

In search of something for the family? Why not try our Korma Paste Sachet?

At Patak's, we have over 60 years of spice blending expertise, so you know you are in good hands. Patak's makes perfect!

description: STREET KITCHEN PUNJABI CASHEW KORMA KIT 255G
ingredients: Water, Onion, Ginger, Garlic, Spices, Vinegar, Cashew Meal (3%), Desiccated Coconut, Sunflower Oil, Salt, Natural Flavour, Tomatoes, Sugar, Cream Powder (Milk), Corn Starch, Almond Meal, Food Acid (Citric), Vegetable Gum (Xanthan)
long_description:
A mild curry sauce famous for its distinctive cashew nut creaminess and fragrant aromas. Just add Meat or Vegetables.

If you plan to spend a week, month or a year on a culinary journey that takes you through India, then Punjab is an absolute must. The imposing history of the region inhabits the essence of its diverse cuisine. On the streets you will find an endless assortment of vegetarian and non-vegetarian delights.
From this region comes the distinctive Mughlai style of Korma, with a creamy base of mild spices and ground cashew, heightened only by aromatic spices. This mild curry base has to be the most popular with both curry expert and novice alike.
Street Kitchen gives you the basics so that you can now bring your own style to the sensational Punjabi Cashew Korma. Enjoy the journey!

description: THE SPICE TAILOR MADRAS CURRY KIT 300G
ingredients: Onion (35%) Tomatoes (29%) Sunflower Oil Garlic Ginger Ground Coriander Seeds Tomato Paste Ground Spices (1.5%) Chilli Powder Salt Dried Whole Spices (Red Chilli, Black Pepper, Fennel Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Cardamom) Ground Black Pepper Concentrated Tamarind Paste Curry Leaves Green Chilli Sugar
long_description:
This earthy, rich and aromatic madras curry is delicious with chicken, paneer, seafood or vegetables

Sauce Facts
Madras Curry is said to epitomise the British interpretation of Indian 'curry' as a spicy sauce for meat. In fact, early renditions of madras recipes in British cookbooks simply instructed you to stew meat, onions and peppers and add a spoonful of curry powder before serving - far from the sophistication of Indian curries. However, in our rendition of this Anglo-Indian favourite, we have drawn inspiration from the curries originating from the historic madras area of India and created a complex sauce using tomato, onion, garlic, ginger, tamarind and a mix of spices to create layers of delicious flavour.

  • 3 Simple Steps

  • Serves 2-3

  • Ready in 10 mins

  • No artificial flavours

  • No artificial colours

  • No artificial preservatives.

  • Complex and rustic.

  • Chilli rating - hot - 3.

long_description:
Patak's Mango Chicken Curry Sauce is a very mild and creamy curry sauce with a delicious blend of mangoes and aromatic spices. A real crowd pleaser.

Simply fry your meat or vegetables, pour over the sauce and simmer. All the hard work done for you: a tasty and authentic Korma curry in just 20 minutes.
Serve with Patak's Mini Pappadums, Naans, Chutneys and Pickles.

In search of something hotter? Why not try our Tikka Masala Curry sauce?

Contains no artificial flavours and colours. Suitable for vegetarians.

Our Patak's sauce jars are 100% recyclable. Please rinse and recycle glass jars with the metal cap on, either at home or at your nearest glass recycling facility to help us minimise our environmental impact.

At Patak's, we have over 60 years of spice blending expertise so you know you are in good hands. Thanks Patak's !

With their soft and fluffy texture and authentic taste, Guerrero Homestyle Burritos embody the essence of Mexican heritage and bridge the deep-rooted culinary traditions of Mexico and the contemporary.
Guerrero Homestyle Burritos are the perfect addition to your dinner table, crafted with high quality ingredients and no artificial colours or flavours, offering a premium taste experience at home.
The larger size tortilla enables more of your favourite fillings to enjoy!
Suitable for vegetarians and vegans

long_description:
Squashies were invented by taking some of your favourite Swizzels flavours and creating uniquely soft and foamy, deliciously moreish sweets. Since then we have added more and more fantastic flavours in the range to help bring joy and fun to the everyday. The Strawberry & Cream flavour will melt in your mouth and is highly enjoyable! If happy was a sweet, it would be Squashies! Try some of these squidgily, squashable squeezable sweets and see the Squashies side of life.

  • Free from Artificial Colours

  • Made in UK

long_description:
Tilda® is a multicultural British brand that has been the go-to choice for rice aficionados for 50 years. Founded back in London in 1970, we introduced Pure Basmati to rice-loving communities from around the world, who were looking for aromatic Basmati that they couldn't find in the UK at the time. Today we are proud to sit at the heart of many dinner tables with our wide, delicious range including many Tilda® dry rice varieties as well as Tilda® Microwave Rice, Tilda® Super Grains and Tilda® Kids. All Tilda products are made with carefully sourced, natural ingredients so they're all nutritionally balanced and packed with natural goodness. By removing broken and inferior grains we make sure that our rice cooks up perfectly. Tilda® makes choosing the right rice for the right dish easy, allowing you to select the best grains so that you enjoy the most delicious flavour combinations as well as all of the authenticity of the original dish. So whether it's a zingy Thai curry with a sticky fragrant Jasmine rice, a vibrant jambalaya with textured Long Grain adding bite or a delicious biriyani with slender, delicate Basmati – the rice you choose can really elevate your favourite dish. B Corp - Our ambition is to be one of the most trusted and responsible rice producers in the world. As a certified B Corporation, Tilda® believes in doing business that is good for people and the planet. We work closely with rice farmers, partnering to protect the environment and reduce the climate impacts of growing rice. We also support local communities through our long-standing partnership with The Felix Project and invest in state-of-the-art manufacturing to reduce the impacts of our products. Visit Tilda.com for more information about our B Corp certification and to view our annual Impact Report that provides transparency over our activities and progress.

Delicious and wholesome, Tilda® Microwave rice is the perfect meal or accompaniment that can be heated in a microwave for 2 minutes or for just 3 minutes in a pan. The wide range includes over 20 different, tasty variants ranging from classic grains such as Pure Basmati, Jasmine and Long Grain to inspiring flavours from around the world such as Caribbean Rice & Peas, Coconut and Peri Peri. Whether you're cooking up a curry, building a burrito, or finding the perfect rice to go with your favourite seasoned chicken, Tilda has you covered. The whole range is gluten free and vegetarian, and contains no artificial flavourings, colours or preservatives. Nearly the whole range is also suitable for vegans (please check individual product details). Visit www.tilda.com for more information on our range and for tasty recipe inspiration! Made with specially selected grains, Tilda Sticky Rice has a delicious subtle taste with a perfectly sticky texture, making it ideal for Poke bowls and Sushi.

Stir through raw cubes of salmon in soy sauce, sesame oil and lime juice. Place on top of Tilda Sticky Rice and garnish with toasted sesame seeds.Finish with mango cubes, edamame, shredded nori seaweed, avocado and radish slices. For a tasty vegetarian alternative, replace the salmon with asparagus or roasted butternut squash.
name: Sticky Rice

ingredients: Long Grain Basmati Rice
long_description: Basmati Rice is known as the 'Prince of Rice' and the 'Fragrant One' as it is light in texture and deliciously aromatic. Maharajah's Choice Basmati Rice is grown and harvested in the foothills of the Himalayas and watered by its snow-fed rivers. The finest grains are selected to provide an authentic experience in aroma, flavour and texture. Each perfectly pearl white, slender grain releases a subtly distinctive aroma and flavour that will compliment your Indian and Middle Eastern dishes. No artificial colours, No artificial flavours, No preservatives, No cholesterol and Low in fat. 100% Australian owned family business. Pioneers in Indian food since 1970.
name: Basmati Rice

long_description: SunGrow Black Rice is an ancient variety of 100% Whole Grain Black Rice, grown and nurtured in the plush & fertile fields of Mekong Delta. It is popularly referred to as Emperor's Rice or Forbidden Rice. Enriched with antioxidants & minerals, it provides a natural source of protein, iron, dietary fibre & energy. SunGrow Black Rice has a sweet magical aroma, delicious nutty taste & striking deep colour when cooked. Use it in your salads, as an accompaniment to your mains or enjoy it as a pudding for your desert.

ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Arborio Rice.
long_description:
Cucina Matese Italian Arborio Rice 1kg


  • Premium Italian rice
  • Ideal for classic risotto
  • Product of Italy


Cucina Matese Italian Arborio Rice is a premium quality Italian rice perfect for creating classic risotto. It's produced by a family-run company and grown and processed in the Po valley in Northern Italy.


Arborio is a variety of rice with a long and rounded shape that lends itself perfectly to risotto. With Cucina Matese Italian Arborio Rice you get a firm and slightly chewy grain which holds it shape and creates deliciously creamy risotto. The high starch content of Cucina Matese Arborio Rice also allows it to absorb large amounts of broth during cooking, resulting in a rich and full flavour and hearty texture.


Cucina Matese Arborio Rice is produced by a family of millers in the town of Po Valley in Northern Italy who select only the finest Italian grains for their premium Arborio rice.

Serve your risotto with a good quality Parmesan cheese and your favourite ingredients and flavours.

ingredients: durum wheat semolina, pea proteins 10.8%
long_description:
Experience a push of protein in every bite with Barilla Protein+ 100% plant-based pasta. Thanks to its rich protein formulation with 20g of protein per 100g, Barilla Protein Plus Penne is made with a perfect balance of selected semolina and pea protein, while maintaining the classic pasta taste you love.

A perfect choice for those looking to boost their daily protein intake, Barilla Protein+ brings the joy of cooking flavourful food to your kitchen without compromising on taste.

Take on your day with a push of protein in every bite thanks to Barilla Protein+ 100% plant-based pasta. In just 10 minutes, you can create the perfect al dente texture, ready to pair with a wide variety of sauces and dishes-whether it's a hearty meat sauce, a vibrant vegetable medley or a rich cheese and butter blend.

Explore the full range of Barilla's Protein Plus pasta to find the perfect match for your favourite recipes.

At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make pasta and sauces that are good for you and good for the planet.

  • 100% plant-based pasta made with just two ingredients: selected semolina and pea protein

  • High protein: 20g of protein per 100g

  • Bronze die pasta

  • Cook in 13 minutes

  • Made in Italy

ingredients: durum wheat semolina
long_description:
Barilla Fettuccine n.6 is made from flat sheets of pasta, which are cut into ribbon-shaped strands, known in Italian as fettucce. Suitable for almost any pasta sauce, be it oil, dairy, or tomato-based, serve with leeks, Italian sausage, grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, and a white wine pasta sauce for a modern dish everyone will love. Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time, our fettuccine pasta cooks in just 12 minutes. Simply bring 4 to 6 quarts of water to a boil, adding salt to taste to enhance the pasta's flavor, then add the fettuccine. For authentic al dente pasta, boil uncovered, stirring occasionally for 12 minutes. For pasta that's more tender, boil for an additional minute. Drain well and serve immediately with your favorite Barilla pasta sauce. With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Elbows or Farfalle to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you're guaranteed to always get a perfect al dente bite. At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877. We believe that cooking for someone can be a true sign of love, told in a few minutes by preparing a beautiful dish of pasta for the people you care about most. At Barilla, we strive to make pasta and sauce products using quality ingredients that are good for you and good for the planet. Barilla. A sign of love.
  • Made with high quality non-GMO durum wheat, this pasta cooks in just 12 minutes for perfect al dente pasta every time

  • Free from major allergens: This pasta is lactose, peanut, shell fish, fish, tree nut, and soy free, and is suitable for vegetarians

  • Established in Parma in 1877 and family-owned for 4 generations, Barilla brings you the joy of eating pasta

  • Experience the authentic Italian taste with Barilla Fettuccine n.6

ingredients: Rehydrated potatoes 70% (water, potato flakes), corn flour, potato starch, rice flour, salt, acidity regulator: lactic acid, preservative: sorbic acid, turmeric.
long_description:
Simply Wize Traditional Italian Style Gnocchi is made from top quality Gluten Free ingredients which are processed and mixed in small quantities ensuring a consistently top quality product. 

These delectable gnocchi are like delicate little clouds that melt in the mouth. They're fantastic with all sorts of sauces, from a simple summer tomato sauce to the richest winter meat sauce, and taste great served with a few leaves of safe and melted unsalted butter. Simply Wize gnocchi is easy and quick to make. 
  • Gluten-Free: Ideal for coeliacs and those with gluten sensitivities.

  • Dairy-Free & Vegan: Suitable for vegan and dairy-free diets.

  • Soft & Fluffy Texture: Just like traditional gnocchi.

  • Premium Potatoes: For authentic flavour and quality.

  • Versatile: Perfect for a variety of savoury dishes

  • No Compromise on Taste: Delicious gluten-free option..

  • Quick & Easy to Prepare: Simple and fast cooking..

  • Gluten-Free Pasta Alternative: Perfect for pasta lovers..

long_description:
From the makers of Italy's best pasta for over 140 years, Barilla Collezione Orecchiette comes from Puglia in Italy. Meaning little ears, it has a unique shell-like shape, and is smooth and grooved outside. Serve with asparagus, spinach, sultanas and ricotta sauce for an authentic Italian pasta meal or pair with hearty tomato-based sauces and your favourite type of meat.
Part of our Collezione range for the perfect creative touch, elevate your kitchen skills with Barilla's Collezione Orecchiette.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have shared our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.

long_description:
Barilla's classic Spaghettoni n.7 is slightly thicker in diameter than the popular Spaghetti shape while remaining long and slim. Traditionally served with oil-based sauces, it works just as well with dairy and tomato-based sauces. Make delicious Italian dishes like Carbonara, or pair it with a Pomodoro sauce and your favourite seafood or vegetables.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Penne Rigate or Farfalle to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you're guaranteed to always get a perfect al dente bite.

long_description:
Farfalle, which means “butterfly” in Italian, originated in northern Italy's Lombardy and Emilia-Romagna regions in the 1500s. Today, Barilla's classic Farfalle stays true to tradition with square pieces of pasta pinched in the middle to mimic the shape of a butterfly. Served hot or cold, this short pasta was made for light and delicate vegetable-based sauces and in soups, salads and casseroles.

Part of our Collezione range for the perfect creative touch, elevate your kitchen skills with Barilla's Collezione Farfalle.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

ingredients: durum wheat semolina,
long_description:
Making Italy's best pasta for over 140 years, Barilla's classic Penne Rigate is one of the most famous Italian pasta shapes and is popular all over Italy. The name Penne, which means pen in Italian, is derived from the shape of the pasta. The quill of an old writing pen inspires the tubular cut with bevelled ends. Suitable for almost any pasta sauce, whether it's oil, dairy or tomato-based, opt for a classic Italian dish like Penne all'Arrabbiata or Penne alla Carbonara.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Fusilli or Farfalle to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite. At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

country_of_origin: Made in Australia from Australian ingredients
ingredients: Durum Wheat Semolina.
long_description:
Since 1985, Zafarelli has been crafting Italian-style pasta from 100% durum wheat semolina to bring the taste of Italy to Australian households.

Zafarelli Pennette Rigate No. 18 is a ridged, penne-style pasta with angled ends, designed to hold onto rich, hearty sauces. With a 12-minute cook time, it's ideal for dishes like bolognese, silky carbonara, or chunky tomato rag.

Pennette Rigate is a household favourite that delivers a satisfying texture in every bite - perfect for everyday meals or comforting classics. Zafarelli brings out the true Italian in everyone.

It's The Only Italian You Need To Know

  • 100% durum wheat semolina

  • Ridged penne perfect for chunky sauces

  • Easy to cook, delicious to eat

  • Ready in 12 minutes

  • 100% Durum Wheat Semolina

  • Suitable for Vegans

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives

  • Cooks in 12 Minutes

long_description:
Al Bronzo is the reinvented traditional Italian pasta for your kitchen cupboard. Made with 100% selected durum wheat and extruded through our new bronze die, Barilla Al Bronzo high-fibre pasta has a rougher surface texture, allowing more sauce to stick to it and the pasta to hold its shape better after cooking.
It's the perfect wheat pasta for a family gathering and special occasions with your loved ones.

Al Bronzo pasta captures sauce the Italian way.

  • Hold sauce to the last drop

  • Crafted with traditional Italian bronze-die method with micro-engravings

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Contains selected durum wheat providing approximately 14% protein

  • With a unique full-bodied, golden amber colour and slightly roasted taste.

  • Pair Al Bronzo Spaguetti with Barilla Bolognese pasta sauce or Pesto Genovese for a delicious and quick pasta meal.

long_description:
Barilla's classic Spaghettini n.3 is slightly thinner in diameter than the popular Spaghetti shape and is delicately long and slim. Traditionally served with light sauces and seafood, Spaghettini also works well in hot broths or soups.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every timeyou'll
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Penne Rigate or Farfalle to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you're guaranteed to always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

ingredients: durum wheat semolina
long_description:
Al Bronzo is the reinvented traditional Italian pasta for your kitchen cupboard. Made with 100% selected durum wheat and extruded through our new bronze die, Barilla Al Bronzo high-fibre pasta has a rougher surface texture, allowing more sauce to stick to it and the pasta to hold its shape better after cooking.
It's the perfect wheat pasta for a family gathering and special occasions with your loved ones.
Al Bronzo Pasta captures sauce the Italian way
  • Hold sauce to the last drop

  • Crafted with traditional Italian bronze-die method with micro-engravings

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Contains selected durum wheat providing approximately 14% protein

  • With a unique full-bodied, golden amber colour and slightly roasted taste.

  • Pair Al Bronzo Linguine with Barilla Arrabiata pasta sauce or Pesto Genovese for a delicious and quick pasta meal.

ingredients: durum wheat semolina, water
long_description:
While the origin of Barilla's Pipe Rigate no.91 is unknown, it's believed to have come from Roman gastronomic culture.
Its curved tubular shape is similar to that of a snail's shell and is perfect for scooping up all sorts of sauces, from a creamy, butter-based sauce to a homemade Bolognese.
Try this Italian pasta with a simple tomato sauce and chunky fish or pair it with fresh vegetables in a pasta salad for a quick dinner idea.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Fusilli or Penne Rigate to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have shared our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet - 100% of our packaging is designed to be recycled.
Barilla. A sign of love.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • 100% recycled material

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • Halal certified.

long_description:
Since 1985, Zafarelli has been crafting Italian-style pasta from 100% durum wheat semolina to bring the taste of Italy to Australian households.

Zafarelli Liscio Piccolo No. 40 is a smooth, elbow-shaped pasta that cooks in 8 minutes. Its hollow, curved shape is ideal for holding sauces, making it perfect for family favourites like macaroni cheese, hearty soups and pasta bakes.

Liscio Piccolo is easy to prepare and loved by kids and adults alike. Whether baked or stirred through a creamy sauce, it delivers comfort in every bite. Zafarelli brings out the true Italian in everyone.

It's The Only Italian You Need To Know

  • 100% durum wheat semolina

  • Perfect pasta for mac and cheese

  • Easy to cook, delicious to eat

  • Ready in 8 minutes

  • 100% Durum Wheat Semolina

  • Suitable for Vegans

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives

  • Cooks in 8 Minutes

long_description:
Since 1985, Zafarelli has been crafting Italian-style pasta from 100% durum wheat semolina to bring the taste of Italy to Australian households.

Zafarelli Spaghetti No. 4 is a classic long pasta, loved for its versatility and perfect pairing with both simple creamy sauces and hearty meat-based recipes like Bolognese. It's long, round strands cook in 8 minutes and deliver that authentic al dente texture every time.

Spaghetti is always a winner, no matter the occasion - whether you're cooking for one or feeding the whole family. Zafarelli will bring out the true Italian in everyone!

It's The Only Italian You Need To Know

  • 100% durum wheat semolina

  • Classic, versatile pasta for any sauce

  • Easy to cook, delicious to eat

  • Ready in 8 minutes

  • 100% Durum Wheat Semolina

  • Suitable for Vegans

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours or Preservatives

  • Cooks in 8 Minutes

long_description:
Barilla Angel Hair n.1 gets its name from its delicate long and thin shape. Also known as Capellini pasta, it originated in central-northern Italy and is traditionally served with light sauces and seafood like scallops. It also works well in hot broths and soups. Pair with artichokes, toasted pine nuts, and breadcrumbs for a modern dish everyone will love.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time. Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time, our angel hair pasta cooks in just 3 minutes.
Simply bring 4 to 6 quarts of water to a boil, adding salt to taste to enhance the pasta's flavour, then add angel hair. For authentic al dente pasta, boil uncovered, stirring occasionally for 3 minutes. For pasta that's more tender, boil for an additional minute. Drain well and serve immediately with your favourite Barilla pasta sauce. 
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Penne Rigate or Farfalle to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you're guaranteed to always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Cooks in 3 minutes

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

long_description:
Cucina Matese Risoni 500g.
  • Classic Italian pasta
  • Made in Italy
  • 4.5-star health rating
This classic Cucina Matese Risoni is made in Italy using time-honoured techniques and quality ingredients. Carefully selected durum wheat is stone ground using clear spring water from the Matese mountains and then bronze cut which gives the pasta a rougher texture that ensures the sauce adheres well and each bite has a richer flavour. Cucina Matese Risoni is a versatile pasta variety often used in traditional minestrone, stews and braises. It pairs well with chunky, hearty sauces like a rich tomato or creamy parmesan. Team it with semi-dried tomatoes and add eggplant and ricotta cheese for a simple yet memorable dining experience. Or create an easy one pot meal that's deliciously moreish by cooking chicken thighs in a little olive oil with garlic and aromatic herbs such as thyme and oregano, add in Cucina Matese Risoni, chicken stock and cream and simmer until sauce has thickened. Serve with fresh baby spinach, parmesan and crusty bread.

long_description:
Al Bronzo is the reinvented traditional Italian pasta for your kitchen cupboard. Made with 100% selected durum wheat and extruded through our new bronze die, Barilla Al Bronzo high-fibre pasta has a rougher surface texture, allowing more sauce to stick to it and the pasta to hold its shape better after cooking.
It's the perfect wheat pasta for a family gathering and special occasions with your loved ones.

Al Bronzo pasta captures sauce the Italian way.
  • Hold sauce to the last drop

  • Crafted with traditional Italian bronze-die method with micro-engravings

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Contains selected durum wheat providing approximately 14% protein

  • With a unique full-bodied, golden amber colour and slightly roasted taste.

  • Pair Al Bronzo Fusilli with Barilla Basilico pasta sauce or Pesto Genovese for a delicious and quick pasta meal.

long_description:
Barilla's classic Fusilli originated in southern Italy and was inspired by the idea of winding Spaghetti around a knitting needle. Since then, Fusilli has been reinterpreted and given its characteristic spiral shape, which is now more typical of central and northern Italy. Full-bodied with just the right consistency, it's suitable for rich recipes with meat or green sauces like Pesto but can also be served cold as part of a salad with high-quality olive oil.
Use it to update your tuna salad or make a delicious Sicilian Fusilli with anchovies, eggplant, olives, chilli, and more.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe.
From our short pasta like Blue Box Farfalle or Penne Rigate to long pasta such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite. At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have shared our passion with the world since 1877. We believe that cooking for someone can be a true sign of love, told in a few minutes by preparing a beautiful dish of pasta for the people you care about most. At Barilla, we strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

long_description:
Barilla's classic Linguine is a long, flat and wide pasta originating in the Liguria region of northern Italy. Thanks to its flat and slightly convex shape, Barilla Linguine is perfect for enhancing the taste of all your favourite oil, dairy, or tomato-based sauces as it absorbs the sauce, releasing a whole variety of flavours. Embrace the Mediterranean diet and try it with seafood, high-quality olive oil and fresh herbs.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With various shapes in our range of traditional semolina pasta, you can find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Rigatoni or Fusilli to longer variations such as Blue Box Angel Hair or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.

  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

long_description:
Cucina Matese Casarecce 500g.
  • Classic Italian pasta
  • Made in Italy
  • 4.5-star health rating
This classic Cucina Matese Casarecce is made in Italy using time-honoured techniques and quality ingredients. Carefully selected durum wheat is stone ground using clear spring water from the Matese mountains and then bronze cut which gives the pasta a rougher texture that ensures the sauce adheres well and each bite has a richer flavour. Cucina Matese Casarecce is a versatile pasta variety with a loosely rolled up and twisted shape that's ideal for capturing all types of sauces. Try it with creamy varieties like Alfredo or carbonara, or a tomato-based sauce paired with vegetables, meat or seafood. You can also create a simple yet memorable warm pasta salad with Cucina Matese Casarecce, green olives, anchovies and crispy prosciutto topped with sweet cherry tomatoes, capers and fresh basil leaves. So delicious and full of flavour. Perfect for lunch or dinner or as a side dish alongside grilled meats at your next barbeque.

ingredients: durum wheat semolina
long_description:
Rigatoni is one of Italy's most popular pasta shapes. Inspired by Riga, which translates to ridges, it originated in Rome and features a large diameter with striped ridges on the outside. Barilla's classic Rigatoni stays true to tradition with a more full-bodied shape for the perfect balance of thickness and consistency. It pairs perfectly with all kinds of sauces, from chunkier meat sauces to lighter vegetable-based and tomato sauces.
Try it in a baked casserole dish like Pasta al Forno. Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Fusilli or Penne to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make pasta and sauces that are good for you and the planet
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.

ingredients: durum wheat semolina
long_description:
Al Bronzo is the reinvented traditional Italian pasta for your kitchen cupboard. Made with 100% selected durum wheat and extruded through our new bronze die, Barilla Al Bronzo high-fibre pasta has a rougher surface texture, allowing more sauce to stick to it and the pasta to hold its shape better after cooking.
It's the perfect wheat pasta for a family gathering and special occasions with your loved ones.
Al Bronzo pasta captures sauce the Italian way.
  • Hold sauce to the last drop

  • Crafted with traditional Italian bronze-die method with micro-engravings

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Contains selected durum wheat providing approximately 14% protein

  • With a unique full-bodied, golden amber colour and slightly roasted taste.

  • Pair Al Bronzo Penne Rigate with Barilla Bolognese pasta sauce or Pesto Genovese for a delicious and quick pasta meal.
name: Al Bronzo Pasta Penne

ingredients: . Ingredients, durum wheat semolina, water.
long_description:
Barilla's classic Risoni is a delicate, versatile pasta that works just as well as rice. Perfect for various dishes from main courses to sides, add some interest to your favourite vegetable soup, mix up a cold side salad or try Risoni Risotto with this rice-shaped pasta.
Part of our Classic Blue Box range, which means perfect, quality al dente pasta every time.
With a variety of shapes in our line of traditional semolina pasta, you're sure to find the perfect pasta for any recipe. From our short shapes like Blue Box Fusilli or Penne Rigate to longer variations such as Blue Box Linguine or Spaghetti, you'll always get a perfect al dente bite.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877, when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Made with 100% Italian high-quality durum wheat semolina

  • Excellent SOURCE OF ENERGY, naturally low in fat with low glycemic index that KEEP YOU FULLER FOR LONGER.

  • Vegan, NON-GMO, NO artificial ingredients, artificial colours, flavours, sweeteners, preservatives.

  • Italian pasta makers since 1877

  • 100% recycled material

  • Halal certified.
name: Pasta Risoni

Grenade's iconic high protein, low sugar protein bars are the ultimate snack for any time of day. Triple-layered, coated in European chocolate and high in fibre, these bars are the perfect way to curb your sweet cravings, increase your protein intake and keep you going throughout the day. Peanut Nutter is packed with 20g of protein and only 1.7g of sugar! Loaded with real peanut chunks on top of a peanut-butter-flavoured nougat and a bed of gooey caramel - all coated in smooth milk chocolate! It's the absolute nuts!

long_description:
When it comes to protein, bigger is better and the BSc High Protein Low Carb bar Choc Fudge Slab delivers Australia's highest protein in a bar. With an incredible 48g of protein, less than 3g of carbs, low sugar, and gluten free, this protein powerhouse is built for those who demand more from their nutrition.

 
Sink your teeth into a rich, fudgy chocolate explosion with every bite. This isn't just a protein bar, it's like your favourite brownie but loaded with 48g of protein and decadent, melt-in-your-mouth chocolate, with a satisfying crunch.

Whether you are looking for post workout recovery, a powerful protein boost to fuel your day, or a way to keep those gains on track, the BSc High Protein Low Carb bar Choc Fudge Slab has you covered.

BSc is Australia's greatest Sports Nutrition brand, with 26 years of excellence in sports and fitness.

Power Greatness; Train. Play. Recover.
  • Australia's highest protein in a bar - 48g protein.

  • Low carb.

  • GLuten Free.

  • Low sugar.

Each gut-loving bar contains up to 9g of Beneficial Fibre Blend.

Introducing the BSc High Protein Mellow Bar, your newest protein obsession.

A light, fluffy, marshmallow-textured centre, coated in a crisp chocolate layer. High Protein, Low Carb, Low Sugar and Gluten Free, in three delicious flavours: Strawberry, Banana and Salted Caramel.

Try the protein bar taking Europe by storm and experience a protein bar texture like nothing Australia has seen before.

Perfect after a workout or when you need a high protein snack, with 17g of protein per 50g bar.

  • Gluten free.

  • Marshmellow-texture.

  • Low sugar.

Sucker for Protein? Get Ready for a Sweet Treat!

Iconic Australian Sports Nutrition brand BSc is teaming up with the world-wide icon Chupa Chups to deliver a collaboration that is vibrant, juicy and a little bit cheeky. 

Recover, rehydrate and enjoy a flavour-revolution! The iconic Chupa Chups flavour, Grape packs a whopping 20g of protein. This tasty powerhouse blend features Collagen, Whey, and BCAAs, plus added Vitamin C and essential sports minerals. 

Whether it's post-workout fuel or a tasty mid-afternoon pick-me-up, this protein-packed treat has you covered.

BSc is Australia's greatest Sports Nutrition brand, with 26 years of excellence in sports and fitness.

long_description:
Introducing Macro Mike x Golden Gaytime Protein Powder!
Get ready to treat your taste buds to the ultimate indulgence with our latest collaboration - Macro Mike x Golden Gaytime Protein Powder! We've taken the iconic Aussie dessert you know and love and transformed it into a delicious, plant-based protein experience that's perfect for your daily grind.

Imagine the creamy, caramel-vanilla goodness of Golden Gaytime, now packed with all the benefits of our signature, gut-friendly protein blend. Each scoop is loaded with high-quality, plant-based protein, making it the perfect post-workout treat or anytime snack.

Here at Macro Mike, we're all about making your healthy lifestyle as delicious and easy as possible. Our Macro Mike x Golden Gaytime Protein Powder is:
  • 100% Plant-Based: Fuel your body with clean, sustainable protein.
  • Gut-Friendly: Packed with probiotics and digestive enzymes to keep your tummy happy.
  • Free from Artificial Nasties: No artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners. Just pure, wholesome goodness.
  • Easy to Use: Blend it into your smoothies, mix it with your favorite milk, or bake it into your favorite treats!
Whether you're a fitness enthusiast or just someone who loves a good dessert, this limited-edition flavor is a must-try. So why wait? Dive into the irresistible taste of Golden Gaytime with the nutritional power of Macro Mike.

Grab yours today and experience the golden magic!

long_description:
Nature's Way Instant Natural Protein is a delicious way to help get your daily protiein needs to help with a healthy & active lifestyle. INP is reduced in fat* and contains no animal or milk products, making it an ideal great tasting high protein food supplement. 

Nature's Way Instant Natural Protein is ideal for: 

Sport/Muscle Tissue Repair:
Protein is a mjor bulding block in the body. it is required for muscle growth and tissue repair. INP can be taken prior to your workout to assist with energy production or within 30 minutes after your workout for muscle tissue repair.

Heart Health:
INP is low in saturated aat, and as part of a diet low in saturated fatm can contribute to reducing total blood cholestrol. INP is a source of thiamine, which is necessary for healthy heart function.

Energy Metabolism:
INP is a long lasting sustained energy source, giving your cells the proper nutrition you need to stay active, fit and firing all day long.

Healthy Lifestyle: 
Protein is a great tasting way to help muscle growth and tissue repair, to be used in conjuction with a healthy diet & exercise. 

Tissue Building & Repair: 
INP provides a quality protein with amino acids to help tissue building and repair. 

Cooking/ A healthy snack:
INP is a great way to maintain optimum nutrition and help meet your daily protein needs. Just sprinkle on your food, incorporate into your baking or mix into a shake each day.

*Branched Chain Amino Acid
  • Assists muscle growth & tissue repair

  • Supports protein intake

  • Vegan friendly

  • B1 - helps healthy heart function

long_description:
To achieve peak performance, it's not just about how hard you train—it's about fueling your body with the right nutrients and staying hydrated to support recovery, muscle growth, and endurance. That's where BSc EAAs +Hydration comes in, the ultimate intra-workout supplement designed to enhance muscle recovery, reduce fatigue, and keep you hydrated so you can go further and recover faster.

Hydration plays a key role in sustaining performance and preventing fatigue. BSc EAAs + Hydration provides 550mg of essential minerals per serve—Calcium, Magnesium, Potassium, and Sodium—to replenish electrolytes lost through sweat and ward off dehydration. This premium blend ensures your muscles stay fuelled and hydrated throughout even the toughest workouts.

With no fat, low sugar, and Non-GMO ingredients, BSc EAA's +Hydration delivers clean, effective nutrition for anyone aiming to elevate their performance by buffering intra-workout lactic acid and delivering rapid muscle replenishment.

BSc is Australia's greatest Sports Nutrition brand, with 26 years of excellence in sports and fitness.

Power Greatness; Train. Play. Recover.
  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids.

  • Added Glutamine.

  • Intra-Workout Fuel.

  • Muscle Performance.

  • Added Sports Minerals.

long_description:
Musashi Creatine is a highly researched and widely used sports supplement. Creatine is a molecule produced in the body and is dietary precursor of phosphocreatine which release energy. It helps increase muscle strngth and improve physical performance during high intensity excersise. Musashi Creatine provides the benefits of creatine in a convenient capsule form readily available before or after exercise.
  • Creatine Monohtdrate 500mg helps increase muscle stregth.

  • 3g daily dose.

  • 6Caps/Day.
name: Creatine Capsules

long_description:
You asked. We listened! BSc Creatine is now available in a great value 500g size.

Creatine is the most researched single ingredient in sports nutrition, and for good reason. Proven to enhance strength, power, and performance during intense physical activity, it's an essential supplement for anyone serious about training. Whether your goal is to build lean muscle, improve recovery, or increase training volume, creatine helps you train harder for longer, ensuring you get the most out of every workout.

BSc Pure Creatine is 99.9% pure pharmaceutical-grade micronised creatine monohydrate, free from added sugars, fillers, and artificial ingredients. This vegan friendly formula has a neutral flavour, making it easy to mix into your daily protein shake, smoothie, water, or any other liquid.

Every batch of BSc Pure Creatine is tested for banned substances by HASTA Human & Supplement Testing Australia for purity and safety.

BSc Pure Creatine is your go to supplement for enhancing performance and achieving your fitness goals. When combined with resistance training, it supports lean muscle growth, helping you build the physique you've always wanted. Beyond its physical benefits, BSc Pure Creatine may also positively impact brain health, making it a well rounded addition to your daily routine.

BSc is Australia's greatest Sports Nutrition brand, with 26 years of excellence in sports and fitness.

Power Greatness; Train. Play. Recover.
  • 3g of pure creatine per serve.

  • Increase strength and muscle mass.

  • HASTA tested for purity and safety.

  • Improve post workout recovery.
name: Creatine

WHY SUP CREATINE?
Elevate your results through intense gym sessions. Push your workout to the max. These gummies have a powerful serve of creatine. By converting creatine to phosphocreatine, you can support intense exercise, helping you intensify your workout. Perfect for on-the-go consumption.

LOAD & MAINTAIN
Amplify your workout with 3000mg of performance maximising Creatine. If you want to support muscle gain and push your limits - make these your new training essential.
  • Train harder

  • Push through plateaus

  • Explosive exercise

  • Muscle gains

  • Power

White CHOC BITS are irresistible morsels of 100% real chocolate that magically hold their shape when baked. So you can create delicious biscuits, cookies, brownies and muffin. Or add a yummy twist to family favourite pancakes, banana bread and vanilla cake. These choc chips also make great no fuss decorations so add some deliciousness to your creations today! Made from 100% certified sustainable cocoa, supplied through the Nestle Cocoa Plan. Nestle BAKERS' CHOICE - Made for Baking

- Cocoa can pick up moisture and aromas from other products, so store in a cool, dry place, away from herbs and spices and other aromatic foods.
- CADBURY BOURNVILLE Cocoa is suitable for decorative coating or dusting. Sift first and sweeten with a little icing sugar if desired.
  • Perfect for baking

  • Rich chocolate taste

  • High quality

long_description:
Equal Spoonful 113g Jar - Great Taste, Fewer Calories, Perfect for Cereals, Desserts, Smoothies, and Indulgent Beverages!

Each spoonful of Equal is packed with great taste and contains only a fraction of the calories found in traditional sugar, making it the ideal choice for all your sweetening needs.

*GREAT TASTE, FEWER CALORIES: Equal Spoonful offers a classic sweet taste trusted and enjoyed for over 30 years, but with the added advantage of being low in calories. One Equal spoonful (1.3kJ) equals the sweetness of one level teaspoon of sugar (70kJ), allowing you to indulge in sweetness without the unwanted calories.

*PERFECT FOR CEREALS, DESSERTS, SMOOTHIES, AND INDULGENT BEVERAGES: Enhance the flavors of your morning cereals, delectable desserts, and refreshing smoothies with the perfect sweetness of Equal Spoonful. Whether it's a delicious bowl of cereal or a tempting indulgent beverage, Equal makes every moment sweeter without compromising your calorie goals.

*LOW-CALORIE SWEETENER: Enjoy the sweetness of Equal while keeping your calorie intake in check. With just 0.3 calories per serve, this sweetener is a smart choice for those looking to reduce their calorie consumption without compromising on taste.

*FREE FROM GLUTEN, NUTS, EGGS, OR MILK: Equal Spoonful is thoughtfully crafted to suit various dietary preferences and needs. It is free from gluten, nuts, eggs, and milk, making it suitable for those with specific dietary restrictions.

*VERSATILE USAGE: Whether it's hot or cold beverages, desserts, cereals, or smoothies, Equal Spoonful adds a delightful touch to all your favorite treats and drinks. Elevate your culinary creations with the perfect level of sweetness.

*EASY 1:1 SUGAR REPLACEMENT: One Equal spoonful is equivalent in sweetness to one level teaspoon of sugar, ensuring that your recipes retain their desired level of sweetness without the extra calories.

*SUITABLE FOR COELIAC AND VEGETARIAN DIETS: Equal Spoonful is a great choice for individuals following coeliac and vegetarian diets, providing them with a safe and delicious sweetening option.

*TRUSTED AND ENJOYED FOR OVER 30 YEARS: Equal has been a trusted name in sweeteners for over three decades, and with the convenience of the Spoonful 113g Jar, you can enjoy the great taste without any hassle.

Make the switch to Equal Spoonful 113g Jar and relish the great taste with fewer calories. Transform your cereals, desserts, smoothies, and indulgent beverages into a guilt-free, sweet experience - try Equal Spoonful today and savor the sweetness of life!

long_description:
Hermesetas Mini Sweeteners are the clever way to sweeten. They let you keep enjoying sweetness while giving up unwanted sugar calories instead!

Great tasting and great value premium Swiss quality Hermesetas Sweeteners have been available since 1932, and they are trusted and enjoyed as the clever calorie-free way to replace sugar and sweeten food and drinks in over 100 countries worldwide.

Hermesetas Mini Sweeteners are perfect to use in coffee and tea. One Hermesetas Mini Sweetener Tablet has 0 calories (0 kJoules), and is equal in sweetness to one teaspoon of Sugar which has 16.7 kcalories (70 kJoules)

Hermesetas Mini Sweeteners are made in Switzerland, and are Vegan, Gluten Free, Lactose Free, Kosher, and Halal.

The great value table top click dispenser contains 800 Tablets and releases one tablet at a time. Visit www.hermesetas.com for lots of healthy tips and also great tasting recipes using Hermesetas Granulated.

  • - 800 tablets per pack

  • - Mini size for on-the-go use

  • - No added calories

  • - Made from high-quality sweeteners

  • - Perfect for sweetening drinks and desserts.

long_description:
Great taste minus the calories. One Equal sachet (15 kJ) is equivalent in sweetness to two level teaspoons of sugar (140 kJ) Equal sachets dissolve quickly to perfectly flavour your hot and cold drinks, and are great on cereal too. Sprinkle away!

*Low Calorie Sweetener.

*Only 4.0 calories per serve.

*Contains No Gluten, Nuts, Eggs, or Milk.

*Classic sweet taste trusted and enjoyed for over 30 years.

*1 sachet of Equal = 2 level tsp of sugar.

*The perfect way to sweetener your favourite beverage.

*Suitable for Coeliac and Vegetarian diets.
  • Classic sweet taste.

  • Only 4 calories per serve.

  • Get sweetsmart.

ingredients: Demineralised Water, Agave Syrup, Sweetener: Steviol Glycosides, Preservative: Sorbic Acid.
long_description:
Enjoy the great tasting 100% Natural low calorie sweetness in SteviaSweet which comes from the leaves of the stevia plant, combined with other natural ingredients. SteviaSweet Liquid with Agave is the clever new way to sweeten your food and drinks naturally, with each 0.5mL serve (10 drops) providing the same amount of sweetness as a teaspoon of sugar. Just 0.67kJ (0.16 kcalories) per serve of SteviaSweet Liquid compared to 70kJ (16.7 kcalories) per teaspoon of sugar for the same amount of sweetness! SteviaSweet Liquid is also heat stable, so its perfect for cooking and baking, and for using in hot drinks, as well as in cold drinks like smoothies, and to sweeten desserts and yogurt. 

  • - Vegan

  • - Gluten Free

  • - Made in Switzerland

  • - Naturally low calorie

  • - Lots of flavour

  • - 100% natural.

  • - Heat stable.

ingredients: Sweeteners (organic erythritol 99%, monk fruit extract 1%).
long_description:
100% NATURAL, PLANT BASED AND ORGANIC SWEETENER WITH MONK FRUIT to replace raw sugar in your favourite beverages, desserts, and pastries to achieve your sugar free lifestyle.

TASTES & BAKES LIKE RAW SUGAR without the calories. It is the best tasting low calorie sweetener perfect for your sugar free beverages, cakes, and breads.

LOW CALORIE SWEETENER: ONLY 1.0 calorie per serving suitable for low carb diet.

KETO FRIENDLY: Less than 1 gram of carbs per serving.

Helps with weight management and is SUITABLE FOR PEOPLE WITH DIABETES

1: 1 SUGAR REPLACEMENT: This sweetener contains Organic Erythritol and Monk Fruit Extract. 1 teaspoon is equivalent in sweetness to 1 teaspoon of raw sugar.

MONK FRUIT: Which is also know as Luo Han Gou or the Buddha Fruit was discovered ages ago in the pristine highlands of China. For centuries, Buddhist monks have used it along with other ingredients in traditional Chinese medicine for the purpose of promoting chi and longevity.

ORGANIC ERYTHRITOL SWEETENER: Erythritol has a low glycemic index and can be used in place of sugar in recipes or beverages. It is a naturally occurring sugar alcohol found in some fruits, vegetables and fermented foods. Whole Earth's Monk Fruit brown sugar replacement is made with ORGANIC ERYTHRITOL.

Monk Fruit extract is 200 times sweeter than sugar, so just a very tiny bit gives a whole lot of sweetness. So we combined carefully-selected Monk Fruit extract with organic Erythritol that gives it sugar-like volume and texture, making it perfect for everyday use. Monk Fruit is just 1% of the ingredients but provides more than half the sweetness!

ingredients: Sweeteners (Erythritol, Organic Steviol Glycosides 0.2%), Vegetable gum (Acacia).
long_description:
100% NATURAL BAKING STEVIA AND ERYTHRITOL SWEETENER: Substitute sugar with A SPECIALLY crafted baking sweetener with the sweet taste of stevia leaf and erythritol, to bake cakes, muffins, cup cakes, biscuits, and cookies.

SUGAR ALTERNATIVE: Each canister contains 600 g of delicious Sugar Free WHOLE EARTH BAKING SWEETENER, Organic Stevia, Erythritol Sweetener, and it is ideal for any bakery, restaurant, cafes, coffee shops, and eateries.

KETO SWEETENER: With zero carbs per serving, this is a keto diet friendly sweetener and a great choice for sweetening keto food and keto snacks—it meets the needs of customers following a ketogenic diet.

NATURAL SUGAR LIKE TASTE and BAKE: An alternative to other sweeteners like sugar, raw sugar, white sugar, caster sugar and other sweeteners.

LOW CALORIE SWEETENER: Contains 1 calorie, no preservatives, no artificial flavors, no artificial sweetener, and no artificial colors; It is gluten free, Non-GMO Project Verified, Vegan friendly, Keto and Paleo friendly, Plant Based

1 for 1 SUGAR CUP REPLACEMENT: This sweetener contains stevia leaf extract; Each cup is equivalent in sweetness to 1 cup of sugar.

BAKING SWEETENER: This low calorie great tasting sweetener is specially crafted for baking, rises and browns like sugar

ERYTHRITOL SWEETENER: Erythritol is a naturally occurring sugar alcohol found in some fruits, vegetables and fermented foods.


- 100% natural sweetness.
- No sugar.
- 1 calorie per serve.
- Low carb.
- Taste & bakes like sugar.
- Cup for cup like sugar.
- Plant-based.
- Gluten-free & vegan friendly.
- Teeth friendly.
- Keto-friendly.
- No artificial sweetener, colours or flavours
- Non GMO.

1 cup (210g) of Whole Earth Baker's Secret (57 Cal) = 1 cup (210g) of sugar (840 Cal). 

At Whole Earth we are continuously rethinking how to source and use the highest quality ingredients to bring you an extensive line of premium, natural and great tasting sweeteners.

Baker's Secret is plant-based and contains no artificial ingredients or preservatives. Use it cup for cup like sugar in your baking recipes. It tastes like sugar, so go ahead, indulge and share the sweetness guilt-free!

description: WHOLE EARTH SWEETNER MONKFRUIT WHITE CANISTER 500G
ingredients: Sweetener (*organic erythritol, monk fruit extract 1%).
long_description:
Crafted with care and precision, Whole Earth Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement Super Value Pack 500g is your ultimate 100% natural, plant-based, and organic sweetener featuring the delightful goodness of monk fruit.

Say goodbye to traditional white sugar and embrace a healthier alternative for all your cooking and baking needs.

-NATURAL SWEETENER WITH MONK FRUIT: Our Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement is derived from the exotic monk fruit, renowned for its heavenly sweet taste and aromatic essence. Embrace the alluring charm of monk fruit as you replace regular sugar in your favorite recipes.

-BAKE AND TASTE WITH EASE: Whole Earth's Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement boasts a delicious flavor and aroma, making it the perfect substitute for white sugar in your sugar-free or reduced-sugar treats. Indulge in guilt-free delights, from delectable cakes to mouthwatering cookies, all made with the magic of monk fruit.

-LOW CALORIE SWEETENING: At only 1.6 calories per serving, this sweetener is your ally in maintaining a low-carb or calorie-conscious diet. Enjoy the sweetness without worrying about unnecessary calories.

-KETO CERTIFIED: Whole Earth Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement contains less than 1 gram of carbs per serving, making it an ideal choice for those following a keto lifestyle. Stay on track with your keto goals while satisfying your sweet cravings.

-SUITABLE FOR WEIGHT MANAGEMENT AND DIABETES: Experience a sweetener that won't compromise your health. Whole Earth Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement is suitable for weight management and diabetes, ensuring you can enjoy sweetness responsibly.

-1:1 SUGAR REPLACEMENT: This incredible sweetener combines the organic goodness of Erythritol and Monk Fruit Extract. Easily substitute 1 cup of regular sugar with 1 cup of our Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement for a perfect sweetness match.
THE ENCHANTING MONK FRUIT: Known as "Luo Han Gou" or the "Buddha Fruit," monk fruit has been cherished for centuries in the pristine highlands of China. Buddhist monks have embraced its use in traditional Chinese medicine to promote vitality and longevity.

-SUPER SWEETNESS WITH A TINY AMOUNT: Monk Fruit extract is incredibly potent, being 200 times sweeter than sugar. With just a tiny bit, you'll experience an explosion of sweetness. Carefully paired with organic Erythritol, it delivers a sugar-like volume and texture, perfect for everyday use. Remarkably, Monk Fruit is just 0.28% of the ingredients but contributes more than half the sweetness!

Make the switch to Whole Earth Monk Fruit White Sugar Replacement Super Value Pack 500g and elevate your culinary creations with a naturally delightful sweetness. Enjoy the exquisite taste of monk fruit, complemented by the goodness of organic Erythritol - a divine duo for a healthier and happier you!
